Description: Uses Claude on assigned tasks; completed usage-guidelines & onboarding training
Reviews and verifies AI-generated test cases/scripts before use (no blind trust)
Can explain any AI-assisted test work submitted
No secrets, credentials or client/PII data ever entered into prompts

Shares useful prompts / learnings with the QA team
Clarity of bug reports (repro steps, logs, screenshots)
Target: High-quality bug reports with minimal clarification needed
